column3: Geographic Representations: Spatial Views of the World
column5: Construct maps to represent and explain the pattern of cultural and environmental characteristics in our world.

column3: Geographic Representations: Spatial Views of the World
column5: Use maps, satellite images, photographs, and other representations to explain relationships between the locations of places and regions, and changes in their environmental characteristics. / Supporting Questions: How could a map be drawn to illustrate the variation and distribution of Middle Eastern religions?

Explain specific roles played by citizens (such as voters, jurors, taxpayers, members of the armed forces, 
petitioners, protesters, and officeholders). 
Supporting Questions: * What powers and responsibilities do religious leaders have in nongovernmental leadership of Middle Eastern countries? * What role do religious leaders play in Middle Eastern governments?
